name: Taco Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Cayenne pepper (1/2 tsp. hot pepper sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large sauce pot.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for about 1 hour or until the mixture thickens.
4. Stir frequently as it thickens to prevent sticking.
5. Pour hot into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
6. Adjust lids.
7. Process in boiling water bath for 30 minutes.
Yield: About 6 half pints.
